title: Marketing Funnel Optimization
summary: Reworked landing page flow, messaging hierarchy, and lifecycle triggers using experiment-backed copy and UX.
description: A systematic overhaul of the entire marketing funnel from first touch to conversion, grounded in behavioral psychology and rigorous A/B testing methodology. The project encompassed landing page redesign, email nurture sequence optimization, pricing page restructuring, and checkout flow improvements. Every change was validated through statistical testing before full rollout, ensuring sustained performance gains.
challenge: Despite healthy traffic volumes, the client's conversion rate had plateaued at 2.1%—well below industry benchmarks. The existing funnel had accumulated years of incremental changes without strategic coherence. Visitors were confused by inconsistent messaging, overwhelmed by options, and abandoning at multiple points in the journey.
solution: Conducted comprehensive funnel audit using heatmaps, session recordings, and user interviews to identify friction points. Redesigned the landing page with clearer value hierarchy and social proof placement. Implemented smart pricing page that adapts based on visitor segment. Created personalized email sequences triggered by specific user behaviors. Built real-time experimentation framework for continuous optimization.
impact: Lifted conversion rate from 2.1% to 4.9% across high-intent traffic—a 133% improvement. Average order value increased 18% through strategic upsell placement. Email nurture sequences achieved 47% open rates and 12% click-through rates, significantly above industry averages.
